title: PlacementMap
description:
`skills/<id>/map.json` — where a skill is materialized + the hashes that drive no-op uninstall and
exact go-back. **Field-set pinned**; `swap_capability`'s value enum is INFERRED.

materialized_sha.description:
sha256 of the bytes topos actually wrote (the projection sha) — may differ from the source
`bundle_digest` if a harness ever projected; with no projection the two match.

placements.description: The target dir(s) where the skill is placed (project / global / per-category layers).

pre_existing_sha.description: sha256 of whatever was in the dir BEFORE placement — restored on uninstall (no-op uninstall).

SwapCapability.description: Whether the placement dir supports an atomic swap, or must degrade. **INFERRED value set.**

oneOf.description: A degraded rename-dance fallback (no single-syscall swap available).
No safe atomic materialization — refuse or warn.
